privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated asset, user, and location data dynamically injected into the Snipe-IT database via setup scripts. The exact target hostnames required by the verifier are 'LON-ENG-ASSET-8001', 'LON-ENG-ASSET-8002', 'BER-ENG-ASSET-8003', and 'TYO-ENG-ASSET-8004'. The verifier also strictly enforces that marketing assets ('ASSET-8005', 'ASSET-8006') and unassigned assets ('ASSET-8007') remain unmodified.
